assertions.description: navigator.clipboard exposes the async Clipboard API surface.
navigator.clipboard.read is a callable function returning a Promise of ClipboardItem[].
ClipboardItem is exposed and constructable so deferred reads can be observed via getType.
ClipboardItem.prototype.getType is a function — the call that triggers the deferred OS read.
A ClipboardItem exposes a readonly array-like 'types' attribute listing MIME types without the data.
assertions.test: (()=>{const i=new ClipboardItem({'text/plain': new Blob(['hi'],{type:'text/plain'})});return Array.isArray(i.types) || (i.types && typeof i.types.length === 'number');})()

assertions.description: navigator.clipboard.write remains the counterpart write API (deferred reads do not change writes).
